messages.text: that hallway fit just raised my blood pressure for no reason
relax drama queen you knew exactly
you posted in black lace and told me to relax is crazy
i did not tell u anything
quick question, how often do you lose your keys
what does that have to do with anything
tryna see if you’ll also lose control around me after hours
and why would i do that
555 475 7404. that was smooth i'll give you that
